title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.560 - Judgments recovered after director takes possession shall not be liens
text:
361.560.  Judgments recovered after director takes possession shall not be liens. — A lien shall not attach to any of the property or assets of such corporation by reason of the entry of any judgment recovered against such corporation after the director has taken possession of its property and business and so long as such possession continues.
(RSMo 1939 § 7933) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5338; 1919 § 11721
